lines.english: Past actions cannot be erased.
Gauree, First Mehl:
What do we know of what will happen hereafter?
Whatever pleases Him shall come to pass.
There is no other Doer except Him. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਜਾਣਾ ਕਰਮ ਕੇਵਡ ਤੇਰੀ ਦਾਤਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa jaanaa karam kevadd teree daat |
lines.english: I do not know about karma, or how great Your gifts are.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਮੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਤੇਰੇ ਨਾਮ ਕੀ ਜਾਤਿ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: karam dharam tere naam kee jaat |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The karma of actions, the Dharma of righteousness, social class and status, are contained within Your Name. ||1||Pause||
You are So Great, O Giver, O Great Giver!
One who takes pride in himself shall never be right.
The treasure of Your devotional worship is never exhausted.
The soul and body are all at Your disposal. ||2||
You kill and rejuvenate. You forgive and merge us into Yourself.
As it pleases You, You inspire us to chant Your Name.
Please, bless me with the Guru's Teachings; my faith is in You alone. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਦਾਨਾ ਬੀਨਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਸਿਰਿ ਮੇਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: toon daanaa beenaa saachaa sir merai |
lines.english: You are All-knowing, All-seeing and True, O my Supreme Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨ ਮਹਿ ਮੈਲੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tan meh mail naahee man raataa |
lines.english: One whose mind is attuned to the Lord, has no pollution in his body.
Nanak abides in the Sanctuary of Your devotees. ||4||10||
All Power is Yours, through the greatness of Your Name.
Through the Guru's Word, the True Shabad is realized.
Those who speak the Unspoken, drink in the Nectar.
Gauree, First Mehl:
Other fears are forgotten, and they are absorbed into the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: poore gur kai sabad pachhaanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Through the Shabad, the Word of the Perfect Guru, I recognize God. ||1||Pause||
Why should we fear, when fear is dispelled by the Fear of God?
Those whom the Lord puts to sleep, evening and morning
And intuitively absorbed into the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਨਰ ਰਾਮੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jis nar raam ridai har raas |
lines.english: Those whose hearts are filled with the Lord's essence are blessed and acclaimed,
- those self-willed manmukhs are bound and gagged by Death, here and hereafter. ||3||
O Nanak, they merge into the Lord, and their doubts are cast away. ||4||11||
Those whose hearts are filled with the Lord, day and night, are perfect.
Gauree, First Mehl:
The four Vedas speak only of the visible forms.
One who loves the three qualities is subject to birth and death.
They describe and explain the three states of mind,
but the fourth state, union with the Lord, is known only through the True Guru. ||1||
Through devotional worship of the Lord, and service to the Guru, one swims across.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਹੁੜਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਨ ਹੋਇ ਹੈ ਮਰਣਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: baahurr janam na hoe hai maranaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Then, one is not born again, and is not subject to death. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਗੁਰ ਅਰਥੁ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bin gur arath beechaar na paaeaa |
lines.english: But without the Guru, they do not understand their true significance.
the Simritees, the Shaastras and the Pandits speak of them as well.
Everyone speaks of the four great blessings;
The treasure of liberation is obtained through devotional worship of the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸਿਆ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai hiradai vasiaa har soee |
lines.english: Those, within whose hearts the Lord dwells,
Through devotional worship of the Lord, liberation and bliss are obtained.
Through the Guru's Teachings, supreme ecstasy is obtained. ||3||
become Gurmukh; they receive the blessings of devotional worship.
He is the Master of the meek, the Giver of peace to all.
One who meets the Guru, beholds Him, and inspires others to behold Him as well.
In the midst of hope, the Guru teaches us to live above hope and desire.
Gauree Chaytee, First Mehl:
Nanak's mind is imbued with the Lotus Feet of the Lord. ||4||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਕਾਇਆ ਰਹੈ ਸੁਖਾਲੀ ਬਾਜੀ ਇਹੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: amrit kaaeaa rahai sukhaalee baajee ihu sansaaro |
lines.english: With your nectar-like body, you live in comfort, but this world is just a passing drama.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂੰ ਕਾਇਆ ਮੈ ਰੁਲਦੀ ਦੇਖੀ ਜਿਉ ਧਰ ਉਪਰਿ ਛਾਰੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: toon kaaeaa mai ruladee dekhee jiau dhar upar chhaaro |1|
lines.english: O body, I have seen you blowing away like dust on the earth. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਬੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਮੁਚੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਹਿ ਬਹੁਤੁ ਉਠਾਵਹਿ ਭਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: lab lobh much koorr kamaaveh bahut utthaaveh bhaaro |
lines.english: You practice greed, avarice and great falsehood, and you carry such a heavy burden.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਕ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਕੀਤਾ ਰਹਸੀ ਮੇਰੇ ਜੀਅੜੇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਵਾਰੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sukrit keetaa rahasee mere jeearre bahurr na aavai vaaree |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only the good deeds which you have done shall remain with you, O my soul. This opportunity shall not come again! ||1||Pause||
Listen - listen to my advice!
